```python
def encode2(input: bytes, inPos: int, inAvail: int, context: dict) -> None:
    if context['eof']:
        return
    if inAvail < 0:
        context['eof'] = True
        if 0 == context['modulus'] and lineLength == 0:
            return   # no leftovers to process and not using chunking
        buffer = ensureBufferSize(encodeSize, context)
        savedPos = context['pos']
        match context['modulus']:  
            case 0:
                pass
            case 1 | 2 | 3 | 4:  
                buffer[context['pos']] = encodeTable[(int(context['lbitWorkArea'] >> (8 - context['modulus'] * 5)) & MASK_5BITS)]
                for _ in range(7):
                    buffer[context['pos'] + 1] = pad
                    context['pos'] += 1
            case _:
                raise IllegalStateException("Impossible modulus " + str(context['modulus']))
        context['currentLinePos'] += context['pos'] - savedPos  
        if lineLength > 0 and context['currentLinePos'] > 0: 
            np.copyto(buffer[context['pos']:], lineSeparator)
            context['pos'] += len(lineSeparator)
    else:
        for _ in range(inAvail):
            buffer = ensureBufferSize(encodeSize, context)
            context['modulus'] = (context['modulus'] + 1) % BYTES_PER_UNENCODED_BLOCK
            b = input[inPos]
            if b < 0:
                b += 256
            inPos += 1
            context['lbitWorkArea'] = (context['lbitWorkArea'] << 8) + b  
            if 0 == context['modulus']:  
                for i in range(8):
                    buffer[context['pos']] = encodeTable[(int(context['lbitWorkArea'] >> (35 - i * 5)) & MASK_5BITS)]
                    context['pos'] += 1
                context['currentLinePos'] += BYTES_PER_ENCODED_BLOCK
                if lineLength > 0 and lineLength <= context['currentLinePos']:
                    np.copyto(buffer[context['pos']:], lineSeparator)
                    context['pos'] += len(lineSeparator)
                    context['currentLinePos'] = 0
```
